recommendation: Shift incremental budget toward high-ROAS and low-CPA channels while protecting upper-funnel investment.
Scale basket recovery and loyalty campaigns because email typically shows high conversion efficiency.
Separate brand and non-brand performance; monitor non-brand CPA and shopping campaign ROAS.
Evaluate paid social using assisted conversions as well as last-click ROAS.
Reduce broad prospecting display spend if CPA is high; prioritize retargeting and frequency controls.
Audit voucher and cashback partners for incrementality and margin impact.
Improve mobile landing pages and checkout flow where conversion rate is lower than desktop.
Track spend, revenue, ROAS, CPA, conversion rate, and channel mix weekly.
